keyword.title: Job keyword
keyword.description: Search keyword or job title (e.g. Flutter Developer, Data Analyst).

location.title: Location
location.description: City or region to search jobs in (e.g. Kochi, Bangalore, Remote).

sources.title: Job sources
sources.description: Select job boards to scrape. Supported values: linkedin, naukri, indeed.

maxItemsPerSource.title: Max items per source
maxItemsPerSource.description: Maximum number of job listings to collect from each enabled source.
